comments.body: Understood - I will make changes to make the MacPorts port contents match what is expected.

OK, the `skopeo` port has been updated - contents are being installed by `make install`: https://build.macports.org/builders/ports-13_arm64-builder/builds/17582/steps/install-port/logs/files

It will take a while for the builders to update the archives for the other macOS versions, but the port should now be correct.
Does that work as expected? Compare https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/787 .
Oh that's useful - give me a few to make those modifications.
As a very minimal litmus test, I think `skopeo inspect` and `skopeo copy docker:… dir:…` needs to work out of the box.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
Closing now; please do reopen if that port is finished.
